privileged_info_summary: The data sources are real bills from Congress.gov. S. 2293 (AI LEAD Act) was introduced by Brian Schatz on July 13, 2023. H.R. 5077 (CREATE AI Act) was introduced by Anna Eshoo on July 28, 2023. Both are genuine AI-related bills from the 118th Congress. However, H.R. 926 is the Supreme Court Ethics, Recusal, and Transparency Act of 2023, introduced by Hank Johnson on February 9, 2023 - it is not an AI-related bill, contradicting the task description and sponsor keyword 'Lieu' in the metadata.
